results.rendered_html:
vinetṛ m.
1 A leader, guide.
2 A teacher, an instructor; sa tatheti vineturudāramateḥ pratigṛhya vaco visasarja muniṃ  R. 8. 91. 
3 A king, ruler.
4 A chastiser, punisher; ayaṃ vinetā dṛptānāṃ  Mv. 3. 46 , 4. 1 ,  R. 6. 39 , 14. 23.
